ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group's purpose or focus */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group managing the dataset */,
  "creation_day" INTEGER /* Day the dataset was created */,
  "creation_month" INTEGER /* Month the dataset was created */,
  "creation_year" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was created */,
  "day_of_value" INTEGER /* Day of value for the dataset */,
  "month_of_value" INTEGER /* Month of value for the dataset */,
  "year_of_value" INTEGER /* Year of value for the dataset */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geography associated with the dataset */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., R, I) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model used for forecasting */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Scenario for the forecast */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., Cases) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source from which the dataset was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The type of data (e.g., disease outbreak, patient admission) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_value_type FOREIGN KEY ("value_type") REFERENCES value_types ("value_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_scenario FOREIGN KEY ("scenario") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_geography FOREIGN KEY ("geography") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("model_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geography */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the geography */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geography for geospatial analysis */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geography for geospatial analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_types" (
  "value_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value type */,
  "value_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the value type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the value type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the model type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantiles" (
  "quantile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantile */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the quantile belongs to */,
  "quantile_value" REAL /* Value of the quantile */,
  "quantile_0_05" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.05 */,
  "quantile_0_1" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.1 */,
  "quantile_0_15" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.15 */,
  "quantile_0_2" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.2 */,
  "quantile_0_25" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.25 */,
  "quantile_0_3" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.3 */,
  "quantile_0_35" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.35 */,
  "quantile_0_4" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.4 */,
  "quantile_0_45" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.45 */,
  "quantile_0_5" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.5 */,
  "quantile_0_55" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.55 */,
  "quantile_0_6" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.6 */,
  "quantile_0_65" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.65 */,
  "quantile_0_7" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.7 */,
  "quantile_0_75" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.75 */,
  "quantile_0_8" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.8 */,
  "quantile_0_85" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.85 */,
  "quantile_0_9" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.9 */,
  "quantile_0_95" REAL /* Quantile value at 0.95 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quantile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quantile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantiles_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
